name: French Canadian Meat Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Minced pork OR 1/3 lb each ground veal, beef, and pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except bread crumbs and pastry in a saucepan.
Bring to a boil and cook uncovered for 20 minutes over medium heat.
Remove from heat and stir in a few spoonfuls of bread crumbs.
Let stand for 10 minutes. If the fat is sufficiently absorbed by the
bread crumbs, do not add more. If needed, repeat the process.
2. Cool the meat mixture and pour into a pastry-lined pan. Cover with
the top crust. Cut steam vents and bake in a 400°F oven until golden brown.
Serve hot with potatoes or rice and your favorite side dish.
(Stored frozen for up to 4-5 months)
